title: psychotria micralabastra
intro: Psychotria micralabastra, also known as the 'Small-leaved wild coffee', is a species of plant in the Rubiaceae family, native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic properties. The health benefits of Psychotria micralabastra include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its ability to act as an antihistamine. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be used to make infusions or decoctions, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
